name: Vienna Crescents
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until light.
2. Add the sugar and blend well.
3. Blend in the flour, then add the nuts and chill the dough slightly.
4. Pinch off a bit of batter and form into crescent shape.
5. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for 23-25 minutes.
7. Cool on a rack.
8. Roll in powdered sugar or sprinkle with it when cool.
Notes: Mom's Christmas cookie
